This is your sign to visit Global Village on the last days of Ramadan and before the season officially closes at the end of the month! 

🌏 Explore the world without leaving Dubai
💫 Experience Ramadan traditions at the Majlis of the World
🎵 Watch live performances
🎡 Enjoy the rides and games
🛍 Shop and dine 

Tag your family and friends!
